meta.title: Mary McCord, Dept of Justice, Keynote at S4x17
meta.description:
Here are some of the highlights:

6:55 Breaking down the wall between law enforcement and intelligence
11:00 DoJ's 1st of a kind indictment of 5 Chinese PLA members for hacking into major nuclear, metals and solar companies. "A line was crossed" "for commercial gain".
14:40 Stealing the color white
18:30 Why is public attribution (name and shame) important
21:45 The international cyber norm recently agreed upon
25:05 Syrian Electronic Army, 3 indicted and 1 picked up in Germany and in jail

Mary McCord is the Acting Assistant Attorney General for National Security at the US Department of Justice. She oversees 400 employees responsible for protecting the United States against international and domestic terrorism, espionage and cyber security threats.
